name: Lentiviral Titer Determination by p24 ELISA
nameCn: 慢病毒滴度测定（p24 ELISA 法）

components.name: 1. Prepare standard: serial dilutions of p24 antigen (0–2,000 pg/mL)

note.en: Use kit-provided p24 standard. Typical 8-point curve: 2000, 1000, 500, 250, 125, 62.5, 31.25, 0 pg/mL in assay diluent. Prepare fresh each time.
note.zh: 使用试剂盒提供的 p24 标准品。典型 8 点曲线：2000、1000、500、250、125、62.5、31.25、0 pg/mL（用稀释液配制）。每次新鲜配制。

components.name: 2. Lyse virus: add Triton X-100 to virus sample (final 0.5%); incubate RT 1 h

note.en: Lysis disrupts viral envelope and releases p24 from intact virions. Mix gently. Dilute sample in assay diluent: test 1:10, 1:100 dilutions to fall within standard curve range.
note.zh: 裂解破坏病毒包膜，释放完整病毒颗粒中的 p24。轻柔混合。用稀释液稀释样品：测试 1:10、1:100 稀释，使读数落在标准曲线范围内。

components.name: 3. Coat ELISA plate: add anti-p24 capture antibody (2 µg/mL, 100 µL/well), 4°C overnight

note.en: Or use pre-coated kit plates (skip this step). Coating buffer: 0.05 M carbonate pH 9.6. Seal plate.
note.zh: 或使用试剂盒预包被板（跳过此步）。包被缓冲液：0.05 M 碳酸盐 pH 9.6。封板。

components.name: 4. Block: 200 µL/well 5% BSA in PBS-T; RT 1 h; wash 3× PBST

note.en: PBST: PBS + 0.05% Tween-20. Washing: 300 µL/well, 3×; flick and blot each wash.
note.zh: PBST：PBS + 0.05% Tween-20。洗涤：每孔 300 µL，3 次；每次甩干并吸干。

components.name: 5. Add standards and samples (100 µL/well); RT 2 h or 4°C overnight

note.en: Duplicates for all. Shake plate gently at 150 rpm during incubation (orbital shaker).
note.zh: 所有样品做双复孔。孵育期间轻摇（150 rpm，摇床）。

components.name: 6. Wash 5× PBST; add detection antibody (anti-p24-HRP, 100 µL/well); RT 1 h

note.en: Dilute HRP-conjugated secondary per kit instructions (typically 1:1,000–1:5,000 in blocking buffer).
note.zh: 按试剂盒说明稀释 HRP 偶联二抗（通常封闭液 1:1,000–1:5,000）。

components.name: 7. Wash 5× PBST; add TMB substrate (100 µL/well); RT 15–30 min (dark)

note.en: Monitor color development (blue). Stop when highest standard is deep blue (~OD 2.0 at 450 nm).
note.zh: 监测显色（蓝色）。最高标准品显深蓝色时终止（450 nm OD ~2.0）。

components.name: 8. Stop reaction: add 50 µL 2 M H₂SO₄ (solution turns yellow)

note.en: Read A₄₅₀ nm within 30 min of stopping.
note.zh: 终止后 30 min 内读取 A₄₅₀ nm。

components.name: 9. Calculate titer: read pg/mL from standard curve; convert to IU/mL

note.en: Conversion: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU (varies by vector/envelope). Accurate IU requires functional titer (lentiviral_titer_functional). ng/mL → pg/µL; multiply by dilution factor.
note.zh: 转换：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU（随载体/包膜变化）。精确 IU 需功能性滴度（lentiviral_titer_functional）。ng/mL → pg/µL；乘以稀释倍数得原液浓度。

notes.en: p24 ELISA measures total physical particles (infectious + non-infectious). Ratio of physical particles to infectious units: ~100:1. Recommended kits: Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA (Perkin Elmer), INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb. Typical unconcentrated lentiviral supernatant: 50–200 ng/mL p24 = ~5×10⁷–2×10⁸ physical particles/mL.
notes.zh: p24 ELISA 测定物理颗粒总数（含感染性和非感染性）。物理颗粒与感染单位比例约 100:1。推荐试剂盒：Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA（Perkin Elmer）、INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb。典型未浓缩慢病毒上清：50–200 ng/mL p24 ≈ 5×10⁷–2×10⁸ 物理颗粒/mL。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Perkin Elmer Alliance p24 ELISA kit manual
